name: Pepper-Chicken Fettuccini Toss
recipeIngredient: 18 oz whole boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into strips
2 large red bell peppers, cut into strips
2 large yellow bell peppers, cut into strips
1 medium green bell pepper, cut into strips
1 teaspoon any salt-free herb seasoning (I like Mrs. Dash garlic and herb)
recipeInstructions:
1 Prepare Creamette fettuccini as package directs; drain.
2 In a large skillet, heat oil.
3 Add chicken, peppers, onion, and mushrooms to the skillet.
4 Season with the salt-free herb seasoning.
5 Cook and stir over medium heat until chicken is cooked through, 8 to 10 minutes.
6 Add hot cooked fettuccini and parmesan cheese to the skillet.
7 Toss to coat. Serve immediately.
8 Refrigerate leftovers.
